result_match_policy.dataset_snapshot_policy: synthetic internal probe; compare only against the staged output artifacts

children.name: Implement pipeline logic
children.requirement: Stage agent-authored implementation code for the spatial-analysis pipeline under /workspace/submission.
children.grading_notes: README planning prose does not count as implementation evidence for this probe.

children.name: Runtime completed
children.requirement: Show runtime or output-artifact evidence that the staged workflow actually executed.
children.grading_notes: A bare README claim is not execution evidence for this probe.

children.name: Report overlap metric from outputs
children.requirement: Report a benchmark-comparable overlap metric from a non-README output artifact.
children.grading_notes: Submission-side metric assertions are intentionally invalid for this probe.
